candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; matches ACT directly.
Balancing helper line, not the reported total; inferior to the explicit total current assets row.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Specific non-current asset line, not total current assets.
Balancing helper for non-current assets, not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets row.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; this is the correct CHE mapping.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the year
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash can reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet cash line for year-end CHE.

candidates.row_label: Translation diference in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX translation effect, not cash balance.
Non-cash adjustment, not cash and equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash flw from investing activities Financing activities
candidates.why: Combined cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line rather than cash flow statement balances.

candidates.why: Explicit total current liabilities line; matches LCT directly.
Balancing helper line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Balancing helper for non-current liabilities, not LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Semantically this is the only non-lease debt-like label and the second occurrence appears in the current liabilities section, which could represent short-term debt. However the same exact label also appears in the non-current section, so the row label is duplicated and ambiguous in this output format.
Current financing liability but explicitly lease-related, which must be excluded from baseline STD.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current lease maturities, but leases must be excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: R:c. Possible STD line is 'Liabilities to Credit Institutions' in the current liabilities section, but the exact same label also appears in the non-current section, creating ambiguity that cannot be resolved with sheet+label only. Lease-related rows were excluded per rule.

candidates.why: Direct current tax liability/payable style line within current liabilities; best match for TXP.
Deferred taxes are non-current/accounting timing differences, not taxes payable.
Deferred tax label, not taxes payable.
Tax asset/receivable, opposite of payable.

variables.notes: Mapped TXP to the current balance-sheet tax liability line.

candidates.why: Explicit total/net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT under IFRS mapping.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/helper version of PPE; inferior to the explicit net PPE row.
Only a component of PPE, not the total.

candidates.row_label: Equipment, tools, fixtures and fittings Net
candidates.why: Component of PPE, not total PPE.
Potential PPE component, not total.

final_choice.row_label: Equipment, tools, fixtures and fittings Net

variables.notes: R:c. Preferred the explicit total/net PPE label, even though preview values are blank in recent columns.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line; direct match for AT.
Explicit net cash flow from operating activities; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working capital changes, not the final operating cash flow figure.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/helper line, not the reported net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
